\tzpentry{ID4756}{Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4756 introduces Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\sigma_{ij} = \\frac{E}{1+\\nu} \\left( \\epsilon_{ij} + \\frac{\\nu}{1-2\\nu} \\delta_{ij} \\epsilon_{kk} \\right) + \\mathcal{G}_{\\mu\\nu}(\\text{Metric Drag})\n\\end{equation}
